name: PHP
synopsis: Server-side scripting language for building dynamic web applications.
description: PHP is a widely-used backend language that runs on the server and generates dynamic web pages. It plugs into HTML like glue, talks to databases easily, and powers a huge chunk of the web (yes, even the “old internet” and a lot of the modern one still). It’s simple to start with, but messy enough to scale into large systems if you’re disciplined… or brave.
